data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Microsoft's architecture heavily relies on cloud services through Azure, providing scalable and flexible infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure for hosting and scalability.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Adopts a microservices architecture to enhance modularity and enable agile deployment.

data.title: Global CDN Distribution
data.description: Employs Content Delivery Networks to ensure fast and reliable content delivery globally.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Uses advanced load balancing techniques to manage traffic efficiently and maintain performance.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Designed to be resilient with multiple redundancy layers to assure uptime.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers and fail-over mechanisms.
